description: Blade Runner meets Instagram. Moody, saturated neons, deep shadows.
description_zh: 银翼杀手遇上 Instagram。情绪化的饱和霓虹与深邃暗影。
color_grade: Crushed Blacks + Neon Cyan/Magenta Split Tone
lighting: Neon Practicals + Hard Edge Kicker + Haze
prompt_suffix: shot on ARRI ALEXA Mini LF with Cooke S7/i 40mm, crushed blacks with neon cyan and magenta split toning, lit by neon practicals with hard edge kicker through haze, 35mm Kodak Vision3 500T grain, moody cyberpunk aesthetic
